name: Pumpkin Harvest Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F/180°C.
2. Combine the first three ingredients and press into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan. Bake for 10 minutes.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together pumpkin, eggs, brown sugar, and spices.
4. Using an electric mixer, beat cream cheese, sugar, and cornstarch until well combined. Blend in the pumpkin mixture.
5. Pour the filling over the crust.
6. Bake for 50-55 minutes, or until the center is just set. Remove from oven and run a knife around the rim of the pan. Allow to cool completely at room temperature. Refrigerate overnight.
7. Serve 10-12 portions.
Variations: Drizzle chocolate in random patterns over cheesecake using an easy piping technique. Melt 2 squares of Baker's Semi-sweet Chocolate over hot water, pour into a small plastic bag, and drizzle around the sides of the cheesecake and in circles on top. Place whole pecans around the edges of the cheesecake.
